title: Origins Weapons
description: Weapons for the 9 origins of the Origins mod (fabric)
body:
Ever wanted to have weapons for the origins mod?

Or just want the origins mod to be less game changing but still want cool effects?

Then the Origins weapons mod is for you!
(this does NOT need the origins mod to be installed!)

There are 9 new weapons for the origins, they all act like netherite swords and have cool abilities!

Weapons:

Avian Broadsword: has a chance to give the attacked entity slowfalling

Arachnid's Fang: has a chance to give the attacked entity poison

Elytian Lance:right click to get boosted forwards

Shulker short Sword: has a small chance to give the attacked entity levitation

Panther's Macuahuilt: right click to get speed

Ender Sword: right click to get extra hearts for a small amount of time

Merling's Cutlass: right click to get dolphin's grace

Magma Dagger: right click to summon a fireball

Phantom blade: right click to get regeneration

PS: use rei or jei to look up the recipes  
**I DONT RECOMEND VERSION 1.0 AS IT HAS THINGS MISSING**

[This mod was made using mcreator](https://mcreator.net/about)
